name: Knockout Bowling VR
developer: Zvky design studio, navin prasad, Charan das, navin prithvi, Gaurav Kudchadkar
short_description: Knockout Bowling is bowling like never before. Set in two new and exciting scenarios with a choice of bottles or bowling pins to knock out, this game is guaranteed to give you hours of bowling fun.
detailed_description:
Even though controls are there for Oculus rift, for htc vive its better.

If bowling is your passion then this 3D-VR bowling game offers you the most exciting, fun and addictive bowling game ever. Set in two different exciting scenarios, one a colorful fair with all the trappings of giant wheel, carousel, hot air balloons, tents and more. And the other a dark tunnel lit with lamps and covered with cobwebs. This game is guaranteed to give you hours of bowling fun. Enjoy the most realistic VR bowling experience!

KNOCKOUT BOWLING FEATURES

Easy and fun to play knock out 3D-VR bowling game

Two different exciting scenarios, two game modes to try

Choice of bottles or bowling pins to knock out

Just pick up to bowl

reviews.review_text:
This title does not properly support Oculus and the controls do not work. 

If you have a Oculus, avoid this game like the plague. 

If you have vive, no comment as I only have the one headset.

I think the nicest thing I can say about ‘Knockout Bowling VR’ is that it is colourful and it works. Not works as in a good game, but in a way that I didn’t experience any crashes. Not even for the small price of £2.89 can I suggest giving this a go as it really doesn’t have the small amount of fun gameplay I would have wanted. It feels terrible to play, it forces you to turn around yourself and the bowling lanes are far too wide and long. Before I can recommend this game it needs some serious work doing to it, so, for now, I would give this one a miss.
